testcase.name: test_login_6th_call_returns_429_json

failure.message: AssertionError: call 0: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @- assert 422 in (401, 403) + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_task3_rate_limiting.py:48: in test_login_6th_call_returns_429_json assert last.status_code in (401, 403), f"call {i}: {last.status_code} {last.text[:120]}" E AssertionError: call 0: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @- E assert 422 in (401, 403) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_register_5_then_429

failure.message: AssertionError: call 0: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @- assert 422 in (200, 201) + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_task3_rate_limiting.py:91: in test_register_5_then_429 assert last.status_code in (200, 201), f"call {i}: {last.status_code} {last.text[:120]}" E AssertionError: call 0: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @- E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_resend_5_then_429
testcase.failure: tests/test_task3_rate_limiting.py:105: in test_resend_5_then_429 assert r.status_code == 200, f"call {i}: {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: call 0: 422 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_markets_60_then_429

failure.message:
AssertionError: {'error': 'Rate limit exceeded: 60 per 1 minute'} assert 'Rate limit e... per 1 minute' == 'rate_limit_exceeded'
- rate_limit_exceeded + Rate limit exceeded: 60 per 1 minute

testcase.failure: tests/test_task3_rate_limiting.py:156: in test_markets_60_then_429 _assert_429_json(r) tests/test_task3_rate_limiting.py:30: in _assert_429_json assert body.get("error") == "rate_limit_exceeded", body E AssertionError: {'error': 'Rate limit exceeded: 60 per 1 minute'} E assert 'Rate limit e... per 1 minute' == 'rate_limit_exceeded' E E - rate_limit_exceeded E + Rate limit exceeded: 60 per 1 minute

testcase.name: test_login_window_resets_after_60s
testcase.failure: tests/test_task3_rate_limiting.py:172: in test_login_window_resets_after_60s assert r.status_code == 429 E assert 422 == 429 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
